name: Claude 4.6 Opus
description:
Claude 4.6 Opus is Anthropic's most powerful frontier model. It sets new standards in complex
reasoning, creative content generation, and coding. It maintains high reliability and nuanced
understanding of complex instructions. Best for the most difficult intellectual tasks and
mission-critical reasoning.
bestPractices:
- Use clear and direct instructions.
- Provide examples for complex tasks.
- Benefit from detailed context and structured input.

name: Claude 4.6 Sonnet
description:
Claude 4.6 Sonnet provides a perfect balance between intelligence and speed. It is significantly
faster than Opus while maintaining high performance on the vast majority of tasks. Best for
scalable AI applications and interactive tasks requiring rapid responses.
bestPractices:
- Effective for high-volume tasks that still require high intelligence.
- Works well with system prompts and persona setting.

name: Claude 4.5 Haiku
description:
Claude 4.5 Haiku is Anthropic's fastest and most cost-effective model. It is designed for
near-instantaneous responses and excels at simple reasoning, data extraction, and
high-volume processing. Best for quick responses and budget-conscious applications.
bestPractices:
- Ideal for simple, repetitive tasks.
- Use concise prompts to maximize its speed advantage.
